_note: Per-lesson role-play scenario. Grounded in B1/001 dialogue + vocab. Learner plays Leo; computer plays Mia. Each NPC node offers 2-3 branches so the same lesson language can be reached different ways. Consumed by RP.Engine + RP.classifiers.local (see roleplay/).
title: 001 · A New Hobby

npc.text: I have started a new hobby.

routes.meaning: Leo asks what hobby Mia has started.
examples: Really? What have you started?
What have you started?
Oh cool, what is it?
That's exciting! What have you started?
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Really? What have you started?”

routes.meaning: Leo guesses what the new hobby might be.
examples: Cool! Is it painting?
Nice! Have you started dancing?
Great! Is it a sport?
routes.hint: 💬 You can guess, or ask “Really? What have you started?”

partial.message: Ask Mia about her news: “Really? What have you started?”

off_topic.message: Mia has news! Ask her “Really? What have you started?”

npc.text: Good guess, but no! Ask me what I have started.

routes.meaning: Leo asks what hobby Mia has started.
examples: Really? What have you started?
Okay, what have you started?
So what is it?
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Really? What have you started?”

partial.message: Ask her directly: “Really? What have you started?”

off_topic.message: Ask Mia “Really? What have you started?”

npc.text: I have started playing the guitar.

learning_objective: Ask how long with present perfect

routes.meaning: Leo says it's cool and asks how long she has played.
examples: That's cool! How long have you played?
Cool! How long have you played?
Nice! How long have you played the guitar?
Awesome! How long have you played?
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “That's cool! How long have you played?”

routes.meaning: Leo asks why she chose the guitar.
examples: Why did you choose the guitar?
Why the guitar?
What made you pick the guitar?
routes.hint: 💬 You can ask “Why did you choose the guitar?” or “How long have you played?”

partial.message: Ask about her playing: “That's cool! How long have you played?”

off_topic.message: Mia plays guitar now. Ask “That's cool! How long have you played?”

npc.text: I have always loved music, so I chose the guitar.

routes.meaning: Leo asks how long she has played.
examples: That's cool! How long have you played?
How long have you played?
How long have you played the guitar?
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “That's cool! How long have you played?”

partial.message: Ask “That's cool! How long have you played?”

off_topic.message: Ask Mia “That's cool! How long have you played?”

npc.text: I have played for three months.

routes.meaning: Leo asks if the guitar is difficult to learn.
examples: Is it difficult to learn?
Is it hard to learn?
Is the guitar difficult to learn?
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Is it difficult to learn?”

routes.meaning: Leo is impressed with her progress.
examples: Wow, that's great progress!
Only three months? That's amazing!
That's really good for three months!
routes.hint: 💬 You can say “Wow, that's great progress!” or ask “Is it difficult to learn?”

partial.message: Ask if it's tricky: “Is it difficult to learn?”

off_topic.message: Ask Mia “Is it difficult to learn?”

npc.text: It was hard at first, but I practice every day.

learning_objective: Give an opinion about a hobby

routes.meaning: Leo gives his opinion that music is a great hobby.
examples: I think music is a great hobby.
Music is a great hobby.
I think music is a wonderful hobby.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “I think music is a great hobby.”

routes.meaning: Leo asks how much she practices.
examples: How long do you practice?
How much do you practice every day?
How often do you practice?
routes.hint: 💬 You can ask “How long do you practice?” or say “I think music is a great hobby.”

partial.message: Share your opinion: “I think music is a great hobby.”

off_topic.message: Tell Mia what you think: “I think music is a great hobby.”

npc.text: I practice for thirty minutes every day.

routes.meaning: Leo says music is a great hobby.
examples: I think music is a great hobby.
Music is a great hobby.
That's dedication! I think music is a great hobby.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “I think music is a great hobby.”

partial.message: Say what you think: “I think music is a great hobby.”

off_topic.message: Tell Mia “I think music is a great hobby.”

npc.text: You should try it too, if you have time.

routes.meaning: Leo says he might learn the drums.
examples: Maybe I will learn the drums!
Maybe I will learn the drums.
Good idea! Maybe I will learn the drums.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Maybe I will learn the drums!”

routes.meaning: Leo says he doesn't have time right now.
examples: Maybe when I have more time.
I'm too busy right now.
Maybe later, I don't have time now.
routes.hint: 💬 You can say “Maybe I will learn the drums!” or “Maybe when I have more time.”

partial.message: Say what you might try: “Maybe I will learn the drums!”

off_topic.message: Mia says you should try music. Say “Maybe I will learn the drums!”

npc.text: That would be awesome! We can practice together.
No problem. Music will be here whenever you're ready!
